ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., sprint, endurance) */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the track (e.g., asphalt, dirt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the driver (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "licensing_authority" TEXT /* Licensing authority for the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider for the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trucks" (
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truck */,
  "truck_name" TEXT /* Name of the truck */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the truck */,
  "engine_specs" TEXT /* Engine specifications of the truck */,
  "chassis_type" TEXT /* Type of chassis used in the truck */,
  "tire_type" TEXT /* Type of tires used in the truck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the truck is participating in */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck participating in the event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver of the truck */,
  "pulling_number" INTEGER /* Pulling number of the truck in the event */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the truck in the event */,
  "qualification_time" TEXT /* Qualification time of the truck in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant (truck) the metric belongs to */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled by the truck in the event */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the truck in the event */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the truck in the event */,
  "lap_time" TEXT /* Lap time of the truck in the event */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the truck in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES event_participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result belongs to */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner of the event */,
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up of the event */,
  "third_place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third-place finisher of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_runner_up_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., racing official, team owner, driver) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_performance" (
  "driver_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver performance record */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver the record belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the record belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric the record belongs to */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_performance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_performance_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "truck_performance" (
  "truck_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truck performance record */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck the record belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the record belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric the record belongs to */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the truck in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("truck_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_truck_performance_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_truck_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_truck_performance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the record belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "practice_session" TEXT /* Practice session time for the event */,
  "qualifying_session" TEXT /* Qualifying session time for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedule_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the sponsor belongs to */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
